---
description: Bash Shell Scripts Instructions
applyTo: "**/*.sh"
---

﻿# 🐚 GitHub Copilot Agent – Shell Script Instructions
<!-- markdownlint-disable MD025 -->

> Applies to all `*.sh`. General instructions override on conflict. Goal: small, robust, portable bash (macOS bash 3.x compatible), zero shellcheck warnings.

---

## 🔑 Core Requirements

| Category | Rule |
|----------|------|
| Shebang | `#!/usr/bin/env bash` first line |
| Strict Mode | Always `set -euo pipefail` + `IFS=$'\n\t'` if splitting needed |
| Lint | Must pass `shellcheck` (no new warnings) |
| Arg Parsing | Use `argc` metadata annotations (`@flag`, `@arg`, `@option`) |
| Help | `@meta description` + autogenerated help; no custom ad-hoc parsing |
| Style | 2-space indent, ≤120 char logical lines |
| Globals | Minimize; prefer local. Constants: `readonly NAME="value"` |
| Predicate | Use `is_*` functions for flag checks (`argc_flag==1`) |
| Temp Files | Under `./tmp`; cleanup via trap |
| Exit Codes | 0 success; non-zero + message on stderr for failures |

---

## 🧱 Structure Pattern

```text
scripts/
    <script>.sh (entry)
    lib/common/*.sh (shared)
    lib/<feature>/{core,output,help}.sh
```

Entry script responsibilities only: parse (argc), source libs, call `main`.

Minimal entry template:

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# @meta author @umatare5
# @meta version 1.0.0
# @meta description Short actionable summary
# @flag --verbose  Enable verbose logging
# @flag --no-color Disable color output
# @flag --insecure Skip TLS verification (dev only)

set -euo pipefail

readonly SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
# shellcheck source=lib/common/common.sh
source "${SCRIPT_DIR}/lib/common/common.sh"
source_wnc_libraries "${SCRIPT_DIR}"

main() {
    if is_verbose_enabled; then echo_info "Starting"; fi
    run_logic "$@"
}
main "$@"
```

---

## 🧩 Naming & Functions

| Type | Convention | Example |
|------|------------|---------|
| Predicate | `is_<feature>_enabled` | `is_verbose_enabled` |
| Internal | lowercase verbs | `run_logic`, `prepare_curl` |
| Shared (common) | lowercase, clear domain | `source_wnc_libraries` |
| Constants | UPPER_SNAKE | `readonly CURL_TIMEOUT=15` |

Keep functions ≤25 lines (exception: structured case statements). Factor repeated CURL preparation.

---

## 🌐 WNC / YANG Access

| Item | Rule |
|------|------|
| Required Vars | `WNC_CONTROLLER`, `WNC_ACCESS_TOKEN` (base64 token) |
| Deprecated | Do not use `WNC_CONTROLLERS` (legacy) |
| Auth Header | `Authorization: Bearer ${WNC_ACCESS_TOKEN}` |
| Accept | `application/yang-data+json` |
| Insecure | Only when `--insecure` flag set |

Validation snippet:

```bash
validate_env() {
    [[ -z "${WNC_CONTROLLER:-}" ]] && echo_error "WNC_CONTROLLER required" && exit 1
    [[ -z "${WNC_ACCESS_TOKEN:-}" ]] && echo_error "WNC_ACCESS_TOKEN required" && exit 1
}
```

---

## 🌈 Output Utilities

Standard colored forms (disable when `--no-color` or CI): implemented once in `output.sh`.
Use: `echo_info`, `echo_success`, `echo_warning`, `echo_error`. Never duplicate per script.

Verbose-only messages must guard with predicate.

---

## 🔐 Security & Safety

- No credential echoing.
- Redact tokens in logs (`${WNC_ACCESS_TOKEN:0:6}...`).
- Default secure TLS; only append `--insecure` when flag.
- Sanitize inputs before command interpolation (avoid word splitting: always quote vars).

---

## 🧪 Testing & Quality

| Check | Expectation |
|-------|-------------|
| shellcheck | Clean (zero new warnings) |
| Dry Run | Provide non-destructive sanity path if operation modifies state |
| Exit Paths | All non-success paths emit an error message first |
| macOS | No `local -n`; use global arrays for legacy bash |
| Temp | All temporaries cleaned via `trap cleanup EXIT` |

Example cleanup:

```bash
temp_file="./tmp/$(basename "$0").$$.json"; mkdir -p ./tmp
cleanup() { [[ -f "$temp_file" ]] && rm -f "$temp_file"; }
trap cleanup EXIT
```

---

## 🧵 Curl Pattern

```bash
declare -a CURL_ARGS
build_curl_args() {
    CURL_ARGS=(--silent --show-error --fail
        --header "Authorization: Bearer ${WNC_ACCESS_TOKEN}" \
        --header "Accept: application/yang-data+json")
    if is_insecure_enabled; then CURL_ARGS+=(--insecure); fi
}
perform_get() {
    local -r url="$1" out="$2"
    build_curl_args
    curl "${CURL_ARGS[@]}" "$url" >"$out"
}
```

---

## 🧪 Predicate Helpers

```bash
is_verbose_enabled() { [[ "${argc_verbose:-0}" == 1 ]]; }
is_no_color_enabled() { [[ "${argc_no_color:-0}" == 1 ]]; }
is_insecure_enabled() { [[ "${argc_insecure:-0}" == 1 ]]; }
```

Do not inline flag comparisons elsewhere.

---

## 📋 Script Creation Checklist

- [ ] Metadata (`@meta` + flags/args) present
- [ ] Strict mode + library sourcing
- [ ] Predicates implemented (no direct `argc_*` in conditionals)
- [ ] Environment validated (if network)
- [ ] Cleanup trap installed (if temp files)
- [ ] shellcheck passes
- [ ] No duplicated utility code

---

## 🛠 Example Usage Snippets

```bash
# export WNC_CONTROLLER=<controller-hostname>
export WNC_ACCESS_TOKEN="<base64token>"
./scripts/get_yang_models.sh --verbose
./scripts/get_yang_model_details.sh --model Cisco-IOS-XE-wireless-access-point-oper
```

Wrap long sample outputs:

```markdown
<details><summary>Sample Response</summary>

```json
{ "example": true }
```

</details>
```

---

## ⚠️ Anti-Patterns (Reject)

| Pattern | Issue | Resolution |
|---------|-------|-----------|
| Unquoted vars | Word splitting | Always quote |
| Duplicated curl args | Drift risk | Centralize builder |
| Direct `argc_verbose` checks | Scattered style | Use predicate |
| `local -n` | Not portable | Use global arrays |
| Inline color codes everywhere | Duplication | Central output helpers |

---

## ♻️ Maintenance

- Periodically prune unused scripts.
- Keep shared helpers minimal & cohesive.
- Consolidate flags: do not proliferate synonyms.

---

End of Shell Script Instructions.
